command:
echo '=== REGRESSION: ChatGPT Read Bridge v5 ==='
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/chatgpt-read-bridge-v5   -H 'Content-Type: application/json'   -H 'X-Operator-Token: moreno-homelab-2024'   -d '{"command":"echo CHATGPT_REGRESSION_OK"}' 2>&1 | head -5

echo '=== REGRESSION: ChatGPT Status Bridge ==='
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/chatgpt-status-bridge-v1-3   -H 'Content-Type: application/json'   -H 'X-Operator-Token: moreno-homelab-2024'   -d '{"command":"router info"}' 2>&1 | head -5

echo '=== REGRESSION: Moreno Operator Governed Transport v2.5 ==='
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/moreno-operator-governed-v2-5   -H 'Content-Type: application/json'   -H 'X-Operator-Token: moreno-homelab-2024'   -d '{"command":"echo OPERATOR_GOVERNED_OK"}' 2>&1 | head -5

echo '=== REGRESSION: bridge-execute (check auth secret) ==='
# Find the actual bridge secret from credentials
python3 -c "
import sqlite3, json
conn = sqlite3.connect('/home/jose/.n8n/database.sqlite')
cur = conn.cursor()
cur.execute("SELECT name, data FROM credentials_entity WHERE id='7kLSJxXgrHsdzlXm'")
row = cur.fetchone()
if row:
    try:
        d = json.loads(row[1])
        val = d.get('value','?')
        print(f'Bridge Secret value: {val[:20]}...')
    except:
        print('Parse error')
conn.close()
"
echo DONE_1876
